card_name: Pressure Assault Super Saiyan Son Goku
ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly states 'Super Saiyan Son Goku.' Orange gi, upright golden spiky hair, golden aura are canonical SSJ1 visual identifiers for Goku specifically. No ambiguity.

trivia_bullets.text: BT3-058 is an Uncommon foil Battle Card from Cross Worlds (released March 9, 2018). It depicts Goku in Super Saiyan 1 form — the baseline Super Saiyan transformation first achieved against Frieza on Namek. Within BT3, Goku appears across multiple power tiers: base form (Leader BT3-032), Super Saiyan (BT3-058), and Super Saiyan 3 (flip side of BT3-032 and standalone SD2-02), making this set a deliberate Goku transformation ladder. [dbs-cardgame.com card list, via WebSearch]

The foil variant of BT3-058 carries the same oracle text as the non-foil printing but with a foil treatment applied to the energy aura effects — a purely cosmetic differentiation. In the DBS Card Game, foil Uncommons are chase variants seeded into booster packs at lower frequency than their non-foil counterparts. [dbs-cardgame.com product page, via WebSearch]

The 'Pressure Assault' title names an aggressive attack archetype in the DBS-TCG vocabulary — cards with this framing typically have power-boosting or rush mechanics that reward forward-facing combat pressure rather than defensive setup. BT3-058's Uncommon rarity places it in the workhorse slot of a competitive deck rather than the top-end finisher slot. [CoreTCG / dbs-cardgame.com, via WebSearch]
